pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 8 to Java 17 to enable compilation for the new runtime.
Upgrade Spring Framework to version 6.1.2, which requires Java 17 and Jakarta EE namespaces.
Upgrade Jetty to version 11.0.19, which supports Jakarta Servlet API 5.0+.
Upgrade Tomcat to version 10.1.17, which implements Jakarta Servlet API 6.0.
Upgrade Undertow to version 2.3.10.Final, which supports Jakarta Servlet API 6.0.
Upgrade Mockito to version 5.8.0, which requires Java 11+ and uses Byte Buddy compatible with Java 17.
Upgrade JUnit Jupiter to version 5.10.0 to ensure compatibility with modern test runners and Java 17.
Upgrade Jackson to version 2.16.1 to maintain security and compatibility with newer Java features.
Upgrade Byte Buddy to version 1.14.11 to support instrumentation on Java 17.
Upgrade SLF4J to version 2.0.9 to align with Logback 1.4+ and modern logging APIs.
Upgrade Logback to version 1.4.14 to support SLF4J 2.0 and Java 17.
Replace javax.servlet-api with jakarta.servlet-api 6.0.0 to comply with Jakarta EE 10 namespace changes.
Replace javax.validation-api with jakarta.validation-api 3.0.2 to comply with Jakarta EE 10 namespace changes.
Add jakarta.annotation-api 2.1.1 to replace javax.annotation-api for Jakarta EE 10 compliance.
